sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Q3eSE_RW0_U05_Reading2
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Q3eSE_RW0_U05_Reading2.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: A Green House
sentences.audio: assets/audio/A Green House.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Some college students in Middlebury, Vermont, had an intelligent idea.
sentences.arabic: كان لدى بعض طلاب الجامعات في ميدلبوري، فيرمونت، فكرة ذكية.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Some college students in Middlebury, Vermont, had an intelligent idea.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Some college students in Middlebury, Vermont
sentences.arabic: بعض طلاب الجامعات في ميدلبوري، فيرمونت
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Some college students in Middlebury, Vermont.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: had an intelligent idea
sentences.audio: assets/audio/had an intelligent idea.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: They wanted to build a special house.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/They wanted to build a special house.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: They wanted the house to be modern.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/They wanted the house to be modern.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: They also wanted the house to use a small amount of energy
sentences.arabic: كما أرادوا أن يستهلك المنزل كمية قليلة من الطاقة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/They also wanted the house to use a small amount of energy.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: They decided to make a building that used the sun for heat and power.
sentences.arabic: هم قرروا بناء مبنى يستخدم الشمس للتدفئة والطاقة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/They decided to make a building that used the sun for heat and power.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The house would be green—that is, it would be friendly to the environment.
sentences.arabic: سيكون المنزل صديقاً للبيئة، أي أنه سيكون صديقاً للبيئة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The house would be green—that is, it would be friendly to the environment.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The house would be green
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The house would be green.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: that is, it would be friendly to the environment.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/that is, it would be friendly to the environment.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The students worked with their professors
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The students worked with their professors.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: They created a design
sentences.audio: assets/audio/They created a design.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: They worked hard.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/They worked hard.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The house is about 93 square meters.
sentences.arabic: تبلغ مساحة المنزل حوالي 93 متراً مربعاً.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The house is about 93 square meters.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: 1,001 sq. ft
sentences.audio: assets/audio/1001 sq  ft.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: It is very comfortable.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/It is very comfortable.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The kitchen, dining area, and living room are next to each other.
sentences.arabic: المطبخ ومنطقة تناول الطعام وغرفة المعيشة متجاورة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The kitchen, dining area, and living room are next to each other.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: A family can share the space.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/A family can share the space.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: It is a nice place to spend time together.
sentences.arabic: إنه مكان جميل لقضاء الوقت معاً.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/It is a nice place to spend time together.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: There are two bedrooms.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/There are two bedrooms.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: One bedroom is for the parents
sentences.audio: assets/audio/One bedroom is for the parents.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The children share the other bedroom.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The children share the other bedroom.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The students found the materials used to build the house nearby.
sentences.arabic: عثر الطلاب على المواد المستخدمة في بناء المنزل في مكان قريب.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The students found the materials used to build the house nearby.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: They did not pay for the materials to travel a long way
sentences.arabic: لم يدفعوا ثمن نقل المواد لمسافة طويلة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/They did not pay for the materials to travel a long way.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: They put a special kind of roof on the house
sentences.arabic: لقد وضعوا نوعًا خاصًا من السقف على المنزل.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/They put a special kind of roof on the house.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The roof collects power from the sun
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The roof collects power from the sun.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: or solar energy
sentences.audio: assets/audio/or solar energy.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The power becomes electricity.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The power becomes electricity.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Power from the sun also makes hot water.
sentences.arabic: كما أن الطاقة الشمسية تُستخدم في تسخين المياه.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Power from the sun also makes hot water.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: This means the people who live in the house have their own energy.
sentences.arabic: هذا يعني أن الأشخاص الذين يعيشون في المنزل لديهم طاقتهم الخاصة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/This means the people who live in the house have their own energy.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: They do not need to spend money for electricity or hot water.
sentences.arabic: لا يحتاجون إلى إنفاق المال على الكهرباء أو الماء الساخن.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/They do not need to spend money for electricity or hot water.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The house has many windows.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The house has many windows.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: It is very bright inside.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/It is very bright inside.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: One wall is made of glass.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/One wall is made of glass.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: There is a small garden inside to grow vegetables.
sentences.arabic: يوجد في الداخل حديقة صغيرة لزراعة الخضراوات.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/There is a small garden inside to grow vegetables.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Children in the house can watch the plants grow.
sentences.arabic: يمكن للأطفال في المنزل مشاهدة النباتات وهي تنمو.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Children in the house can watch the plants grow.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: They can learn about nature.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/They can learn about nature.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The family can grow its own food.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The family can grow its own food.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The students were in a contest with other schools.
sentences.arabic: كان الطلاب يتنافسون مع مدارس أخرى.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The students were in a contest with other schools.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Their school was very small and had only undergraduate students.
sentences.arabic: كانت مدرستهم صغيرة جداً وتضم طلاباً جامعيين فقط.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Their school was very small and had only undergraduate students.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: But their design was very good.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/But their design was very good.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Their house was better than some other houses built by students from large universities
sentences.arabic: كان منزلهم أفضل من بعض المنازل الأخرى التي بناها طلاب من جامعات كبيرة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Their house was better than some other houses built by students from large universities.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Today the house sits on the college campus.
sentences.arabic: يقع المنزل اليوم في حرم الجامعة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Today the house sits on the college campus.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Does a family with young children live there?
sentences.arabic: هل تعيش هناك عائلة لديها أطفال صغار؟
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Does a family with young children live there.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: No
sentences.audio: assets/audio/No.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Students from the college live in the green house.
sentences.arabic: يسعد الطلاب بالتحدث إليكم حول تصميم المنزل
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Students from the college live in the green house.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: The students are happy to talk to you about the design of the house.
sentences.arabic: الطلاب يكونون سعداء بالتحدث إليكم حول تصميم المنزل.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/The students are happy to talk to you about the design of the house.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: They think that everyone should save energy.
sentences.arabic: يعتقدون أنه ينبغي على الجميع ترشيد استهلاك الطاقة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/They think that everyone should save energy.mp3
